summary: Iteration 9: Track button UX update tested. CollegesPage full-width buttons work correctly. CollegeDetailPage untracked/tracked sidebar states work correctly. All 10 features verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 complete. Track button UX updated. CollegesPage: full-width 'Add to My List' (orange) for untracked, 'Tracking' (green) for tracked. CollegeDetailPage: add-to-list-card shown when untracked, disappears + tracked sections appear after clicking sidebar-track-btn. Header btn: 'Add to My List' with shadow when untracked, 'Tracking' when tracked. Auth: use test_session_iter8 token in localStorage.
